headline: Why Is EQT (EQT) Down 1.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: EQT (EQT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: What Makes EQT (EQT) a High -Quality Business?
summary: Eagle Capital Management, an investment management company, released its first quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The letter notes that individual stocks and subsectors are now more reactive to sentiments, reducing market efficiency but creating opportunities to add value. Over the last decade, multi-asset managers, or pods, […]

headline: POWR Provides Broad Exposure To The Energy Supply Chain
summary: POWR benefits from $1.4 trillion in planned utility investments and robust demand across utilities, equipment, and construction. Read why POWR ETF is a Buy.
